channel.title: stock monthly report on SoulSY's story
channel.description: Recent content in stock monthly report on SoulSY's story

item.title: Monthly Report Feb 2021
item.description: The Market was too tough to get money because volatility was high. There was so much up and down. KOSDAQ value ended as -4.49% and KOSPI value has -1.41% on Feb. So many opinion were there with the reason why the market had too much volatility. Someone said inflation would come, others said this was just temporary. As a result, I don’t know exactly which one would be right but there was no evidence to stop my strategies in my opinion.

item.title: Monthly Report Jan 2021
item.description: This is my first report on 2021. I really satisfied that my strategy beat KOSPI1. From the report on Feb 2021, more detailed analysis would be posted because the number of strategies extended 4. It gave me very good performence about 6% in a month. Beginner’s luck was applied to me. High Close MDD 9.53% 5.87% 3.05% KOSPI is Korea benchmark like S&P 500.

item.title: About Monthly Reports
item.description: The reason why I started system trading with GenPort1platform was to develope my skills as learning other things. Ironically, however, now I have been focusing to learn how to do this better. Of course, I can post any other things about computer security, programming skills and IT Tech, etc. But for now, I think I would post this kind of things quite some times. This is an overview for monthly report of my stock asset.
